codeReview.summary: The prior VAL-CROSS-005 blockers are cleared on current HEAD. Commits `fd7d624` and `f3f8deb` add a deterministic kill-worker harness (`scripts/mission-kill-worker-droid.cjs`, `src/backend/droid/missionValidationHarness.ts`, `test/missionKillWorkerHarness.test.ts`), wire it into `package.json` and `.factory/services.yaml`, and replace the old proof bundle with a fresh feature-owned Electron screenshot chain plus updated proof JSON. The new artifacts now start from a Mission-selected `Mission-GUI-TEST` session with Custom `CCH-GPT-5.4`, keep one live session selected through proposal approval, start-run approval, running state, immediate `Kill request sent` feedback, `worker_failed(reason = "Killed by user") -> mission_paused`, and same-session normal-chat continuation. The proof no longer depends on reselecting an already-killed session or on misdescribed Standard Chat setup evidence.

summary: Scrutiny passed. Current HEAD now contains a feature-owned VAL-CROSS-005 deliverable backed by a live same-session Mission-GUI-TEST Electron proof chain, direct `droid.kill_worker_session` diagnostics evidence, and deterministic harness coverage showing the Mission remains inspectable and resumable after a user-killed worker.
